zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery de Creke於大約1190年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可時，她的父親Robert de Creke28歲，母親Agnes de Glanville13歲。她與John de Thorpe在英國英格蘭諾福爾可阿申維爾索普結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1274年在她的家鄉享年86歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery de Creke于大约1190年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可时，她的父亲Robert de Creke28岁，母亲Agnes de Glanville13岁。她与John de Thorpe在英国英格兰諾福爾可阿申維爾索普结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1274年在她的家乡享年86岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Creke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German: nickname or metonymic occupational name for a grower of soft fruits, from Low German Kreke ‘plum’.
Dutch (Van der Kreke): topographic name from Dutch kreek ‘creek’.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery de Creke was born about 1190, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert de Creke, was 28 and her mother, Agnes de Glanville, was 13. She married John de Thorpe in Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died about 1274, in her hometown, at the age of 86.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery de Creke est née environ 1190, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Creke, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Glanville, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé John de Thorpe à Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1274, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 86 ans.

de.Thorpe Manor, Lincolnshire, England: Thorpe St Peter, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Margery de Creke um 1190 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Creke 28 und ihre Mutter Agnes de Glanville 13. Sie hat in Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom John de Thorpe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1274 im Alter von 86 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

Lei sposato John de Thorpe nel Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1274, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 86 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery de Crekeが約1190年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクで生まれた時，父Robert de Crekeは28歳，母Agnes de Glanvilleは13歳であった。イギリスイギリスノーフォルクアシュウエルソルペでJohn de Thorpeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1274年に故郷で86歳で死去した。

ko.Thorpe Manor, Lincolnshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 소 스트 피터
ko.lifeSummary: Margery de Creke(이)가 대략 1190년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Creke(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes de Glanville(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 애스h웰소에서 John de Thorpe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1274년 그녀의 고향에서 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery de Creke nasceu aproximadamente 1190, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert de Creke, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Glanville, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Thorpe em Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1274, em sua cidade natal, com 86 anos.

ru.Thorpe Manor, Lincolnshire, England: таурп ст питир, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery de Creke родилась около 1190 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert de Creke было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Glanville, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Thorpe в местности ашвеллтаурп, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1274 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 86 лет.
